strategy.primaryGoal: Achieve category depth in home blood-pressure monitoring before broader expansion.
strategy.dailyCadence: Research one exact product daily; produce a publish-ready private dossier or a private rejection, ambiguity, unavailability or insufficient-evidence record.
strategy.publicationGate: Every new public URL requires Telegram human approval. Weak pages are never published to satisfy quota.
strategy.externalLegacyBoundary: The Authentic Reviews 2026 blood-pressure flagship and its 9.7 score are outside MDRank control and are not MDRank evidence.

entries.title: Blood-pressure monitor exact-model intake 01
entries.deliverable: A complete private exact-model evidence record or a private rejection/ambiguity record. If eligible, prepare but do not publish a dossier approval packet.
guardrails: Exact-model identity required before product claims
New public URLs require Telegram human approval
Do not change the MDRank homepage automatically or import Authentic Reviews legacy scores
